config.title: Translation Settings
config.description: Choose target language and model. All attributes with source text will be translated.
config.allAttrsNote: Every attribute with an original value is included. Verified translations are never overwritten.
config.sameLanguageError: Target language must differ from the book source language.
config.thinkingHint: Off is default. Turn on for Gemma and similar models if you want the model to reason before answering.

missing_only.label: Missing only
missing_only.hint: Skip attributes that already have a translation in the target language.

refresh_machine.label: Refresh machine
refresh_machine.hint: Re-translate draft and machine translations. Verified translations stay unchanged.

confirm.estimateNote: Entity count and token usage are determined when the job starts. Actual usage depends on attribute count per entity.

progress.title: Translating Glossary
progress.cancelConfirm: Cancel this translation job? Entities already processed will keep their translations.
progress.noEntities: No entities need translation for this language.
progress.pollFailed: Couldn't get the translation progress — the service may be unavailable. Retrying…

results.title: Translation Complete
results.noEntities: All entity attributes already have translations in this language, or no attributes have source text.
results.machineNote: Translations are saved as machine confidence — review and verify in the entity editor.
